tagline: Premium Websites Built for Trades That Want More

hero.headline: Premium Websites Built for Trades That Want More
hero.subheadline: Orbit Logic builds modern websites and digital systems for trades and service businesses across Queensland.

services.title: Premium Website Design
services.description: Custom-built, conversion-focused websites designed specifically for trade and service businesses. Every site is engineered to attract, engage, and convert your ideal customers.

services.title: Website Management
services.description: Ongoing management so your website stays fast, secure, and current. We handle updates, backups, performance monitoring, and content changes so you can focus on your business.

services.title: Conversion Landing Pages
services.description: High-converting landing pages built for specific services or campaigns. Designed to turn paid traffic and organic visitors into qualified leads.

services.title: Lead Capture Systems
services.description: Intelligent lead capture systems that qualify enquiries before they reach you. Stop wasting time on bad leads and start closing more of the right ones.

services.title: Local SEO Foundations
services.description: On-page SEO setup that positions your business to be found by local customers actively searching for your services. Built into every website from day one.

services.title: Website Optimisation
services.description: Audit and optimise existing websites to improve speed, search visibility, and conversion rate. Turn an underperforming site into your best sales tool.

solutions.title: Instant Quote Calculators
solutions.description: Let customers get a real-time estimate directly on your website. Reduce back-and-forth, qualify serious buyers, and save hours every week.

solutions.title: Booking Systems
solutions.description: Let customers book consultations, inspections, or jobs directly from your site. Synced with your calendar and fully automated.

solutions.title: Enquiry Dashboards
solutions.description: See every lead in one place. Track status, source, and follow-up history. Never lose a hot lead again.

solutions.title: Reporting Dashboards
solutions.description: Clear, visual reports showing your website performance, lead volume, and conversion data — delivered monthly or on demand.

solutions.title: AI Follow-Up Tools
solutions.description: Automated follow-up sequences that nurture enquiries, send reminders, and re-engage cold leads — all without you lifting a finger.

solutions.title: Service Area Maps
solutions.description: Interactive maps showing your service coverage, helping local customers instantly see if you operate in their area.

solutions.title: Lead Qualification Forms
solutions.description: Smart multi-step forms that pre-qualify enquiries by job type, budget, location, and timeline before they hit your inbox.

testimonials.name: Jake Moretti
testimonials.quote: Within three weeks of launching our new site, we had more enquiries than the previous three months combined. The system actually works.

testimonials.name: Sarah Drummond
testimonials.quote: I was getting leads from unqualified people wasting my time. The lead qualification form they built changed everything. Now almost every enquiry is serious.

testimonials.name: Tom Harcourt
testimonials.quote: Professional team, premium result. Our website now looks better than businesses ten times our size. Clients comment on it all the time.

process_steps.title: Discovery
process_steps.description: We learn your business, goals, target customers, and competitors to build a precise strategy.

process_steps.title: Design
process_steps.description: A custom design tailored to your brand, your industry, and your ideal client — no templates.

process_steps.title: Build
process_steps.description: Your site is engineered for performance, mobile-first, and conversion from the ground up.

process_steps.title: Launch
process_steps.description: A smooth, monitored launch with SEO setup, analytics, and full handover documentation.

process_steps.title: Grow
process_steps.description: Ongoing management, optimisation, and system upgrades to keep your digital presence ahead.
